  • Method Details

    • read

      public ImmutableSet<PositionedString> read() throws ProofInputException
      Description copied from interface: EnvInput
      Reads the input using the given modification strategy, i.e., parts of the input do not modify the initial configuration while others do.
      Returns:
      The found warnings or an empty ImmutableSet if no warnings occurred.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException

    • getInitialFile

      public File getInitialFile()
      Description copied from interface: EnvInput
      Returns the initial File which is loaded if available.
      Returns:
      The initial File which is loaded or null otherwise.
